name: agent-bridge
description: Bridge plugin to connect coding agents with Agent Bridge sessions and Telegram notifications.

interface.shortDescription: Send and receive agent updates through Agent Bridge.
interface.longDescription: Integrates coding agents with Agent Bridge sessions so tasks, approvals, and progress updates can flow between terminal and Telegram.
defaultPrompt: Create an Agent Bridge session for this project and start task notifications.
Check unread Agent Bridge responses and mark them as read after processing.
Send task_started and task_completed events for my current work.
